team_name: TenderAI – Explainable AI System for Automated Tender Evaluation
summary: Design an AI-based platform for automated tender evaluation and eligibility analysis in government procurement. The system uses OCR, NLP, rule-based evaluation engine, and ensures explainable decision-making.
key_steps: Read tender documents and bidder submissions
Compare bidder data with extracted criteria
Classify bidders as eligible, not eligible, or needs manual review
Flag ambiguous or low-confidence cases for human review
optimization_claims: Scalable decision-making in government procurement processes
